Độ khó 3 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đi rừng. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Lilting Lullaby theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Bảo toàn tài nguyên và đánh quanh carry. Giữ Lilting Lullaby cho giao tranh quyết định, không đi lẻ thiếu thông tin và tận dụng sức mạnh cuối trận để ép Baron hoặc Elder.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Lillia có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Blooming Blows. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Lillia mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Lilting Lullaby là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Lillia được đánh giá mạnh. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Clearwave, Heal, Aoe, Speed, True Dame và sử dụng Lilting Lullaby đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Lissandra is really good in team fights as you can flank the enemy from the side with your  E.
She has incredible gank set up throughout the laning phase thanks to her  W and her  R. This makes her a formidable opponent against squishy champions.
Your wave clear is incredibly strong and you can clear waves fast. You can then use your lane priority to roam with ease.
guide.weaknesses:
Lisandra has to commit to an all-in in order to make use of her kit. This can be a problem if her team is not on the same page as her.
Her Ultimate  R is more of a utility tool rather than a damaging tool. This can be an issue against stronger mid lane champions.
If you’re behind, you’re going to deal no damage in team fights and your poke/all-in will not be very good.

gamePlan.early:
Play safe for the first few levels. You need time to come online and you shouldn’t be fighting unless you have a clear early advantage.
Once you have a few levels under your belt, you can start to play aggressive and look for aggressive plays.
Push the wave and look for roaming opportunities. Lissandra is a very good roaming champion who can impact the map and assist her allies with ease. Post 6, try to push and roam.
gamePlan.mid:
After your bot lane has moved to the mid lane, rotate to the bot side of the map or somewhere else on the map so you can continue to farm and gain XP.
When no team fights are occurring, go to a side lane and push. It’s important that you continue to farm during the mid-game so you can get your items as quickly as possible. Do not just stay mid if you can’t get anything done.
As you’re good at getting picks and killing isolated targets, try to ambush and assassinate enemies who are alone or walking around Summoners Rift alone. After killing someone, make the call for a nearby objective.
gamePlan.late:
Avoid team fighting in the late game unless your Ultimate  R and Zhonya’s Hourglass is up. If you try to team fight when either one of them are down, you will be rather vulnerable.
Use your abilities in the late game to peel for your carries to keep them alive. Use your Ultimate  R on the nearest enemy champion and focus them down first.
Stay with your team at all times. Do not leave them and go to split push as the enemy may force a fight while you’re gone. Stay grouped, but be prepared to stay off to the side and out of vision.

powerSpikes.early:
Lissandra's first item component will allow her to wave clear more efficiently. This is quite beneficial for her team as she can roam around a lot.
Lissandra will get a massive power spike at level 6 due to her ability to chain CC an enemy to oblivion. This is really useful when dealing with a fed or mobile carry.
Putting multiple points in her  Q will make her more powerful. It will let her wave clear quickly and allow her to deal a lot of damage to enemy groups.
powerSpikes.mid:
At level 9, Lissandra's  Q will be maxed out. This means that she will be dealing tons of damage now, especially in grouped fights.
Lissandra is really good in team fights. She can easily CC high priority targets and single-handedly win a team fight due to her AoE abilities and Passive.
Her Ultimate  R at level 11 will provide her with a lot of pick potential. She can use that ability frequently, which means that team fights and picks will be pretty frequent.
powerSpikes.late:
Teams tend to group up during the late game. This means that Lissandra will have a gala time finding picks and CC'ing the entire enemy team.
Her Ultimate  R will become really powerful when it is maxed out. This means that she will be able to pick off enemies with ease and whenever she wants to. This is really beneficial for her team.
Lissandra will have multiple items during this phase of the game. This means that she will be dealing tremendous amounts of AoE damage which will be detrimental to the enemy team.

guideVi.strengths: Lissandra phù hợp với vai trò đường giữa, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi bắt lẻ và bộ công cụ gồm Sight, Slow, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Lissandra có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Ice Shard và Frozen Tomb.
guideVi.weaknesses: Lissandra sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện mở giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường giữa. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Frozen Tomb theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Lissandra có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Ice Shard. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Lissandra mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Frozen Tomb là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Lissandra được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Sight, Slow, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave và sử dụng Frozen Tomb đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Heavy power spike at level two which allows him to run an enemy down with 
his E, Q combo. This combined with his Passive and Summoner Spells may easily get 
him a kill on a squishy target.
Really good wave clear with his W, Q and Ultimate R. This causes him to gain priority really fast and it also helps him secure 
objectives with his Jungler.
Post-six, he can practically one shot an enemy with his combo while 
simultaneously re-positioning with his E. His E also makes him quite slippery, which allows him to evade ganks with ease.
guide.weaknesses:
Very vulnerable when his E is down which can allow him to be very susceptible to ganks. Enemy 
Junglers can take this opportunity to camp him relentlessly.
Reliant on items to win the game. If he is set back during the early game, 
he won’t be able to do a lot in the late game as he just falls off.
If he manages to get an early lead, he may be able to snowball if left 
unchecked. He falls off massively though so the longer the game goes, the 
worse it is for Lucian.

gamePlan.early:
Get level 2 first and look for a favourable trade with the enemy. Gaining 
an early health advantage will help you out.
Focus on farming and looking for aggressive plays once the enemy uses an 
ability. Play around their abilities and look to abuse their cooldowns with 
your early game damage.
After destroying the bottom lane tower, rotate to the mid lane and try to 
take that tower. This will open up the map and give your team a gold lead.
gamePlan.mid:
Stay with your Support throughout the mid-game. If you move away from them, 
you will be an easy target for the enemy. Make sure you’re always near at 
least 1 ally.
Group and stay with your team at all times. Do not split push or avoid 
grouping unless you have a good reason to be away from them.
Look for picks with your Support/Jungler to get kills and increase your 
lead. If you kill a key target, you could make the call for Baron.
gamePlan.late:
Stick with your team in the later parts of the game. If you walk away from 
them and die, it will be 4v5 and the enemy may be able to force a fight or 
end the game.
Focus the nearest enemy champion in team fights and watch your positioning. 
Hold on to your E for the right opportunity. Do not use it recklessly.
Stick towards the back of your team near the Support so they can peel and 
protect you.

powerSpikes.early:
Lucian's level 2 is a decent power spike as it allows him to go for a 
devastating all-in combo. The damage dealt is relatively high, and he can 
quite quickly kill the enemy with multiple combo rotations.
Level six is a significant powerspike, especially when Lucian is against an 
immobile carry. He should have an easy time clearing waves with it as well 
if he needs to recall.
The first item will be a massive power spike for Lucian as it allows him to 
deal a lot of damage. It will give him an inherent advantage, especially if 
he can capitalize on his level two power spike.
powerSpikes.mid:
His first ability will be maxed out at level 9. This will give him a 
massive damage boost and will let him take over the mid-game easily.
Lucian is excellent during the mid-game as this is the time where he is the 
most powerful. He can get rid of squishy targets quickly.
At level 11, Lucian will be able to get his stage 2 Ultimate R. It can help him massively during neutral, objective fights and duels due 
to the amount of damage it dishes out.
powerSpikes.late:
Once Lucian unlocks his 3rd stage Ultimate R, he will be able to dish out tons of consistent damage, especially to low 
health targets. It will make it easier for him to burst down enemies.
Lucian will gain access to multiple items during this stage of the game. He 
will both be able to sustain himself, as well as deal hefty amounts of 
consistent damage.
Lucian's Q and E will be maxed out during this game stage. It will let him all-in enemies 
consistently and will allow him to reposition himself frequently.

guideVi.strengths: Lucian phù hợp với vai trò xạ thủ, có nhịp đầu trận mạnh, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng phản giao tranh, lối chơi kiểm soát bản đồ và bộ công cụ gồm Bonus Dame, Burst Dame, Clearwave, On-Hit, Aoe. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Lucian có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Piercing Light và The Culling.
guideVi.weaknesses: Lucian sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện phản giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Chủ động tạo lợi thế ở xạ thủ. Trao đổi khi Piercing Light sẵn sàng, đẩy nhịp trước đối thủ và chuyển quyền ưu tiên sang sông hoặc rừng.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng phản giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng The Culling theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Lucian có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Piercing Light. Với đánh giá đầu trận mạnh, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Lucian mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. The Culling là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Lucian được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Bonus Dame, Burst Dame, Clearwave, On-Hit, Aoe và sử dụng The Culling đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Lulu can keep her allies alive for a long period of time with her  E and Ultimate  R in team fights. This increases her allies ability to deal damage and survive team fights.
You have a lot of poke thanks to your  Q and  E. This can allow you to win 1v1 fights with the enemy. You can also use your  E to shield yourself rather than using it on the enemy.
Has tons of utility that can assist her in a plethora of scenarios. Lulu is a solid pick and can fit into plenty of team compositions.
guide.weaknesses:
This champion is pretty immobile and is prone to CC. If they get caught out by any CC, they will probably die.
Has less carry potential compared to a lot of other Supports. Lulu relies on her team to carry while she provides them with heals and shields.
Lulu is a squishy champion with low hit points. This makes her pretty vulnerable and easy to kill. Picking your fights and avoiding constant trading is key to winning.

gamePlan.early:
During the laning phase, focus on poking the enemy down to gain a health advantage. When the enemy is low, commit to an all-in.
Try your hardest to keep your ADC alive for as long as possible in lane. Provide them with shields whenever they need them.
After destroying the bottom lane tower, rotate to the mid lane and try to take that tower. This will open up the map and give your team a gold lead.
gamePlan.mid:
As a Support, you’re quite vulnerable and can easily be killed when going to ward, when you’re moving around the map, and when you’re alone. To reduce the chances of dying and getting caught out of position, try and stick with your team at all times.
Keep a constant eye on what major objective is spawning next. If it’s spawning soon, make sure you place vision around the objective as quickly and as safely as possible before retreating to safety. Having vision around major objectives is key.
Look for picks during the mid-game. If you can pick someone off with the help from your allies, you can abuse their death timer to earn more gold and possibly take a tower, an objective or get more kills.
gamePlan.late:
Ward major objectives and place vision in high traffic areas in the late stages of the game. Keep them warded so you can see the enemy move around the map and see them starting the objective.
Stay with your team at all times. Avoid moving around the map alone so you do not get caught out. Getting caught out will result in your team having to play 4v5. Do not ward alone unless you know where the enemy is.
Peel for your allies as much as possible. Keeping them alive for as long as possible in team fights is a must in order to win the game.

powerSpikes.early:
Level 3 is a massive power spike as Lulu gets access to all her abilities. She can either go for full damage all-ins on the enemy or work on defending her ADC as needed.
Level 6 is a massive power spike. She will now annoy the enemy by completely negating assassination and burst down attempts from the enemy's end.
The first item component will surely help Lulu out a lot in the lane. She can spam her abilities frequently due to the increased mana regeneration while simultaneously decreasing the cooldowns of her spells.
powerSpikes.mid:
Lulu will have her core items by now. This means that her shields will be really potent, and it will become challenging for the enemy to all-in her team.
Level 11 is when Lulu becomes a true enabler. This is because her Ultimate  R will now have two points and won't let her ADC die that easily.
Lulu's effectiveness in team fights really comes into play during this phase of the game. Her  W and Ultimate  R will help her when dealing with enemies who like to flank and get to her backline.
powerSpikes.late:
Her late game is phenomenal as she can peel for her team for days. No one can come close to her team as long as her  W and Ultimate  R are up.
Lulu's Ultimate  R at level 16 is a force to reckon with. It will be challenging for the enemy team to eliminate Lulu's team due to the short cooldown of the ability, and killing Lulu will really become next to impossible.
Lulu will be full build by this time in the game. Her shielding potential will be out of the world, and she can enable her entire team if she manages to use her abilities properly.

guideVi.strengths: Lulu phù hợp với vai trò hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận mạnh. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng phản giao tranh, lối chơi kiểm soát bản đồ và bộ công cụ gồm Aoe, Slow, Disengage, Bonus Speed, Buff AS. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Lulu có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Glitterlance và Wild Growth.
guideVi.weaknesses: Lulu sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện phản giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở hỗ trợ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng phản giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Wild Growth theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Bảo toàn tài nguyên và đánh quanh carry. Giữ Wild Growth cho giao tranh quyết định, không đi lẻ thiếu thông tin và tận dụng sức mạnh cuối trận để ép Baron hoặc Elder.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Lulu có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Glitterlance. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Lulu mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Wild Growth là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Lulu được đánh giá mạnh. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Aoe, Slow, Disengage, Bonus Speed, Buff AS và sử dụng Wild Growth đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Really good burst potential with her entire Q, E, Ultimate  combo. This can delete a squishy enemy with ease starting from level six 
itself.
Her W shield is deceptively strong as it can allow her to save all her team 
members from a lot of poke. This is also applicable when she is Support.
Her Q can be used to secure picks inside the enemy Jungle or from blind areas. 
This can be extremely beneficial if the picked target happens to be the 
enemy Jungler or the ranged carry.
guide.weaknesses:
Very immobile and can be killed almost immediately if she is caught out 
without her Q. Layered CC will make her absolutely useless.
She is somewhat item reliant, so camping and killing her a lot during the 
early game will just make her a shield bot during the late game.
She can be picked off easily by the enemy team if she wanders too far from 
her team, or when she is trying to take the Blue Buff. She will also be 
very weak against complete all-ins from the enemy team.

gamePlan.early:
During the laning phase, focus on poking the enemy down to gain a health 
advantage. When the enemy is low, commit to an all-in.
Try your hardest to keep your ADC alive for as long as possible in lane. 
Provide them with shields whenever they need them.
After destroying the bottom lane tower, rotate to the mid lane and try to 
take that tower. This will open up the map and give your team a gold lead.
gamePlan.mid:
As a Support, you’re quite vulnerable and can easily be killed when going 
to ward, when you’re moving around the map, and when you’re alone. To 
reduce the chances of dying and getting caught out of position, try and 
stick with your team at all times.
Keep a constant eye on what major objective is spawning next. If it’s 
spawning soon, make sure you place vision around the objective as quickly 
and as safely as possible before retreating to safety. Having vision around 
major objectives is key.
Look for picks during the mid-game. If you can pick someone off with the 
help from your allies, you can abuse their death timer to earn more gold 
and possibly take a tower, an objective or get more kills.
gamePlan.late:
Ward major objectives and place vision in high traffic areas in the late 
stages of the game. Keep them warded so you can see the enemy move around 
the map and see them starting the objective.
Stay with your team at all times. Avoid moving around the map alone so you 
do not get caught out. Getting caught out will result in your team having 
to play 4v5. Do not ward alone unless you know where the enemy is.
Peel for your allies as much as possible. Keeping them alive for as long as 
possible in team fights is a must in order to win the game.

powerSpikes.early:
Level 2 is an all-in power spike for Lux. She should be able to all-in the 
enemy by using the lane brushes to drop vision and bamboozling the enemy. 
If the enemy is cautious, they will be zoned out easily.
Level 6 is another significant power spike as she will assist her ADC in 
killing the enemy bot lane. The ability can also be used to safely steal 
neutral objectives or snipe kills.
The first item component will make up for good poke as Lux will use the 
lane brushes to keep harassing the enemy bot lane. Her long range will make 
it really hard for the enemy to catch up to her.
powerSpikes.mid:
Lux will not have many items and will hurt a lot due to her AP ratios. Any 
squishy who gets caught by her Q will most definitely end up dying.
She will spike really hard at level 11. This is mainly because of her 
Ultimate  upgrade, which will increase the damage of that ability while drastically 
reducing its cooldown. The mid-lane brushes will be a good place to wait 
for unsuspecting enemies.
Lux is generally good during team fights, but she will excel when fighting 
in choke points. The enemy won't be able to do anything to avoid Lux's Q and will be zoned out by her E poke.
powerSpikes.late:
Her W will allow her to peel multiple carries at the same time. The shield will 
be powerful, so it will work really well against assassination attempts.
Getting 3 points in her Ultimate  will give her a massive damage boost. She will be a source of constant 
DPS, even if she goes for a fully-fledged Support build.
She will have multiple items during this phase of the game, which will make 
her shields and abilities way more potent. It helps her deal with burst 
damage and/or an enemy team filled with hard CC.

guideVi.strengths: Lux phù hợp với vai trò đường giữa, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng cấu rỉa, lối chơi bắt lẻ và bộ công cụ gồm Burst Dame, Clearwave, Root, TeamFight, Disengage. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Lux có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Light Binding và Final Spark.
guideVi.weaknesses: Lux sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện cấu rỉa hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 1 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường giữa, hỗ trợ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng cấu rỉa. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Final Spark theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Lux có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Light Binding. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Lux mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Final Spark là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Lux được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Burst Dame, Clearwave, Root, TeamFight, Disengage và sử dụng Final Spark đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Can absorb a lot of damage for his team with his Passive. This allows him to be a frontline for his team while also being able to escape from death when he goes in with his Ultimate  R.
Post-six, he can set up multiple ganks for both his lane as well as other lanes with his Ultimate  R. This is highly beneficial if the lane he is ganking has some form of CC built in their kit.
He is the bane of all immobile carries, especially the ranged immobile ones. He can quite easily get on top of them and prevent them from doing anything in a fight. If Malphite goes AP, there won’t be an enemy carry for most part of the game.
guide.weaknesses:
Weak during the early game, especially against consistent poke damage which can prevent him from regenerating his Passive shield.
Pre-six, he is quite susceptible to poke so he will be forced to play defensively. He probably won’t be getting any ganks either due to him not having his Ultimate  R.
Proper vision control from the enemy team will prevent Malphite from catching the enemy team off-guard. This will reduce his effectiveness and will force him to find other ways to engage on the enemy team.

gamePlan.early:
Play safe for the first few levels. You need time to come online and you shouldn’t be fighting unless you have a clear early advantage.
Once you have a few levels under your belt, you can start to play aggressive and look for aggressive plays. You benefit from extended trades, so try to go for them frequently.
Keep the minion wave closer to your side of the map throughout the early game. This is the best place for the wave to be as it offers you tons of extra protection.
gamePlan.mid:
Split push during the mid-game and try to secure side objectives. Avoid grouping when your Ultimate  R is down.
Group with your team when your Ultimate  R is up. Rotate from the side lane to wherever your team is and look for a pick with your Ultimate  R.
Peel for your allies in team fights. As you’re a tank, you’re rather weak unless your carries are alive. Thus, keeping them alive is key in team fights. Be prepared to peel for them when necessary.
gamePlan.late:
Do not fight in the late game unless your Ultimate  R is up. It is crucial that you only commit or look for fights when it is available as you’re going to miss out on the potential knockup it provides.
Your Ultimate  R will be on a shorter cooldown in the later stages of the game. If you can find an opportunity to do so, use it to catch out someone who is isolated and alone, too far forward or way out of position.
Peel for your carries to keep them alive for longer. If your allies die quickly, there will be little chance that you will win the team fight.

powerSpikes.early:
He is weak early on as his presence is negligible, and he can't do much against ranged champions. All he needs to do is conserve his health till he gets to level six.
Once he hits level six, his presence will skyrocket, becoming a significant threat for the enemy laner. Working with the allied Jungler will help him massively.
The first item component will allow him to spam his abilities quite frequently. It will also let him deal more damage, especially once he gets his Ultimate  R.
powerSpikes.mid:
He will have his core items by now, which means that his  Q and Ultimate  R should hit like a truck right now.
Multiple points in his Ultimate  R will allow him to use the ability frequently, make picks, and land multi-man Ultimate  R on enemies fighting near choke points.
Malphite is quite good during team fights. He can damage many enemies at once and do so from out of vision, giving the enemy a tiny window to react.
powerSpikes.late:
A fully maxed out Ultimate  R will allow Malphite to dish out hefty amounts of burst damage. Enemy squishies will have an obnoxious time in the game.
He is solid during late-game fights as his  Q and Ultimate  R will hit like a truck now. All he needs to do is wait for the perfect moment.
Depending on which build he goes for, he will either be blowing enemies up all over the map or a reliable front linear for his allies. Regardless, his goal is to get into the enemy backline and separate the front line from the backline.

guideVi.strengths: Malphite phù hợp với vai trò đường trên, đi rừng, đường giữa, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận yếu, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi linh hoạt và bộ công cụ gồm Shield, Auto Target, Slow, Speed, Aoe. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Malphite có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Seismic Shard và Unstoppable Force.
guideVi.weaknesses: Malphite sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện mở giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 1 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn đầu trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường trên, đi rừng, đường giữa, hỗ trợ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Unstoppable Force theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Malphite có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Seismic Shard. Với đánh giá đầu trận yếu, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Malphite mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Unstoppable Force là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Malphite được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Shield, Auto Target, Slow, Speed, Aoe và sử dụng Unstoppable Force đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Malzahar has great pick potential with his Ultimate  R. Picking off one champion could win you the game!
Malzahar has a shield that will protect him against incoming damage. This increases your survivability in lane.
You have great wave clear thanks to your  Q,  W and  E. Once you have an item behind you, you can constantly push the enemy into their tower.
guide.weaknesses:
Malzahar cannot roam as much as other laners. He also is unable to follow the majority of roams due to his low 1v1 potential.
While his Ultimate  R is on cooldown, he is incredibly vulnerable to all-in.
While you’re channelling your Ultimate  R, you will be stood still. This can allow an untargeted champion to fight or kill you. This is a common downfall of your Ultimate  R in mid and late game team fights- especially against hard engage teams.

gamePlan.early:
Play safe for the first few levels. You need time to come online and you shouldn’t be fighting unless you have a clear early advantage.
Once you have a few levels under your belt, you can start to play aggressive and look for aggressive plays. You benefit from extended trades, so try to go for them frequently.
When you’ve hit level 6, request assistance from your Jungler to kill the enemy laner. Request assistance or look to roam whenever your Ultimate  R is up.
gamePlan.mid:
When no team fights are occurring, go to a side lane and push. It’s important that you continue to farm during the mid-game so you can get your items as quickly as possible. Do not just stay mid if you can’t get anything done.
After your bot lane has moved to the mid lane, rotate to the bot side of the map or somewhere else on the map so you can continue to farm and gain XP.
Play around your Ultimate  R in the mid-game. It is an incredibly strong tool that can help you get a kill advantage. With the numbers advantage, you can then make the call for Baron or siege a nearby tower.
gamePlan.late:
Do not fight in the late game unless your Ultimate  R is up. It is crucial that you only commit or look for fights when it is available as you’re going to miss on the CC it provides.
Your Ultimate  R will be on a shorter cooldown in the later stages of the game. If you can find an opportunity to do so, use it to catch out someone who is isolated and alone, too far forward or way out of position.
Peel for your carries to keep them alive for longer. If your allies die quickly, there will be little chance that you will win the team fight.

powerSpikes.early:
He is frail early on as his presence is negligible, and his abilities are telegraphed. All he needs to do is conserve his health and utilize his Passive till he gets to level six.
Once he hits level six, his presence will skyrocket, becoming a significant threat for the enemy laner. Working with the allied Jungler will help him massively.
The first item component will allow him to spam his abilities quite frequently. It will also let him deal more damage, especially once he gets his Ultimate  R.
powerSpikes.mid:
He will have his core items by now, which means he will have a lot of mana and spam his  Q and  W.
Multiple points in his Ultimate  R will allow him to use the ability frequently and make crucial picks. His silence will be invaluable as well.
Malzahar is quite good during team fights as he can silence enemies and can lockdown high-priority targets effortlessly.
powerSpikes.late:
A fully maxed out Ultimate  R will allow Malzahar to dish out hefty amounts of damage. Enchanters and squishy targets will have a hard time.
He is solid during late-game fights as his  Q and Ultimate  R will hit like a truck now. He will need to check the enemy inventory for a QSS before he decides to all-in a champion, though.
His  Q and  E will be maxed out and will be doing many consistent DPS during this phase of the game. The  Q will let him keep the wave in check as well.

guideVi.strengths: Malzahar phù hợp với vai trò đường giữa, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng phản giao tranh, lối chơi linh hoạt và bộ công cụ gồm Immunity, Aoe, Clearwave, Poke, Sight. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Malzahar có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Call of the Void và Nether Grasp.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường giữa. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.

gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Malzahar có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Call of the Void. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Malzahar mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Nether Grasp là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Malzahar được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Immunity, Aoe, Clearwave, Poke, Sight và sử dụng Nether Grasp đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
A supertank who has a ton of CC built into his kit. He can act as a really 
good frontline for his team and can also peel targets from his carries.
His Ultimate R can allow him to set up engages from a great distance. This is extremely 
beneficial when used from out of vision, or when enemies are near a wall.
Provides a lot of vision with his E, which also makes way for brush control. Combine his E slow with his W, he can practically hand pick a target and CC them for some time while his 
team just follows up on him.
guide.weaknesses:
Very weak during the early game and can easily be killed, especially if the 
enemy he is facing happens to be ranged in nature.
Grievous Wounds are a must buy against him during the early game. It 
prevents him from healing a lot, especially when he uses his W, Q engage on a target.
Proper vision control from the enemy team will remove any form of flanking 
opportunity which Maokai can exploit in order to initiate an all-in. This 
will reduce Maokai’s effectiveness.

gamePlan.early:
Play safe for the first few levels. You need time to come online and you 
shouldn’t be fighting unless you have a clear early advantage.
Once you have a few levels under your belt, you can start to play 
aggressive and look for aggressive plays. You benefit from extended trades, 
so try to go for them frequently.
Keep the minion wave closer to your side of the map throughout the early 
game. This is the best place for the wave to be as it offers you tons of 
extra protection.
gamePlan.mid:
Split push during the mid-game and try to secure side objectives. Avoid 
grouping when your Ultimate R is down.
Group with your team when your Ultimate R is up. Rotate from the side lane to wherever your team is and look for a 
pick with your Ultimate R.
Peel for your allies in team fights. As you’re a tank, you’re rather weak 
unless your carries are alive. Thus, keeping them alive is key in team 
fights. Be prepared to peel for them when necessary.
gamePlan.late:
Do not fight in the late game unless your Ultimate R is up. It is crucial that you only commit or look for fights when it is 
available.
Your Ultimate R will be on a shorter cooldown in the later stages of the game. If you can 
find an opportunity to do so, use it to catch out someone who is isolated 
and alone, too far forward or way out of position.
Peel for your carries to keep them alive for longer. If your allies die 
quickly, there will be little chance that you will win the team fight.

powerSpikes.early:
His early laning is not particularly strong, but he can use the lane 
brushes and his E to keep the enemy laner at bay. He may even hide in them to all-in enemies 
when they are pushed up.
Level six will allow him to initiate fights more reliably, especially when 
setting up ganks. The allied Jungler will have an easy time ganking this 
lane.
The first item component will allow Maokai to survive longer and dish out 
more consistent damage in the lane. He just needs to make sure that he 
doesn't get poked out before a fight.
powerSpikes.mid:
Once Maokai gets another point in his Ultimate R, he will use it frequently. If the enemy ignores him leaving the lane, 
they will not have a good time dealing with Maokai's Ultimate R and W.
Maokai is quite good in team fights as he can single out enemies and CC 
multiple enemies with his Ultimate R. His Passive doesn't let him die easily either, so he can play the role of 
a disruptor.
His first ability will be maxed out at level 9. This will allow him to deal 
a lot of damage with the ability and will allow him to use it frequently.
powerSpikes.late:
Once Maokai's Ultimate R gets maxed out, the enemy won't have a perfect time in the game. Maokai's 
team will quickly capitalize on his CC, though.
His tankiness is massive during the late game. His Passive won't let him 
die while he dives the enemy backline, deals damage of his own to them, and 
ensures they can't join the fight.
He is decent during late-game fights as his W, and Q can easily CC a high priority target and prevent them from joining fights. 
This gives time to his allies to damage the other enemies or collapse on 
the CC'd target.

guideVi.strengths: Maokai phù hợp với vai trò đường trên, đi rừng, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi bắt lẻ và bộ công cụ gồm Heal, Uncancellable Windup, Airborne, Aoe, Clearwave. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Maokai có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Bramble Smash và Natures Grasp.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường trên, đi rừng, hỗ trợ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.

gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Maokai có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Bramble Smash. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.

powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Maokai được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Heal, Uncancellable Windup, Airborne, Aoe, Clearwave và sử dụng Natures Grasp đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Can initiate tower dives early on and try to get kills once his laner pushes the wave in. His  Q and  W allows him to drop tower aggro and take reduced tower damage respectively.
Is a scaling monster, and if he manages to get his items and hit the mid-to-late game, he will be almost unstoppable. For a squishy champion, he can one-man the Baron if he is ahead.
His Ultimate  R can completely shift the tide of a fight if he is left unchecked. This allows him to use his  Q frequently, which allows him to avoid CC. Combined with his Wuju Style, he deals a lot of damage.
guide.weaknesses:
Has to powerfarm early game and hence has no impact unless the enemy overextends or overstays. He will mainly focus on cleaning up during the early game.
His  W can easily be interrupted by any form of hard CC. This can make tower dives risky and can get him killed almost instantly if he doesn’t use the ability properly.
Can’t do much if the enemy team just disengages when his Ultimate  R is active. Very susceptible to CC, so if the enemy saves their CC for him, he will die.

gamePlan.early:
Your goal in the early game is to gain as much gold and XP as quickly as you can. Focus on farming rather than ganking or fighting.
Look to secure objectives as often as possible. This will give your team an advantage as the game goes along.
Your Ultimate  R is an incredibly strong tool. Whenever it is up, try to use it to help your allies and get kills.
gamePlan.mid:
Continue to pick up and secure jungle camps whenever possible. Not falling behind in the mid-game is crucial as a Jungler, so make sure you continue to farm!
When no team fights are occurring, go to a side lane and push. It’s important that you continue to farm during the mid-game so you can get your items as quickly as possible. The more gold Master Yi has, the stronger he will be.
If your team gets a kill or two, make the call for Baron or the Dragon. You should be able to take them with ease as Master Yi.
gamePlan.late:
Look to take down the enemy carries. Focus the backline and try to take them out of the fight. Focus them with your other frontline champions.
As you’re the Jungler, you need to make sure you’re always alive in the late game. If you die before a major objective spawns, the enemy will be able to take it.
Make sure you are always on the side of the map that the next major objective is on. If the Baron is up, always stay on the top side. If you go bot and show yourself, the enemy will take the objective for free.

powerSpikes.early:
His early game objective control is phenomenal, especially if his laners have lane priority. He needs to avoid showing up on the map early on, though.
Level six is a significant spike for Master Yi as he can now gank and clean up fights reliably. His  Q usage will determine if all-ins are successful or not.
The first item is a good spike for Master Yi as it gives him increased damage. It will help him with clean-ups, and his Jungle clears.
powerSpikes.mid:
2 points in his Ultimate  R will make him more potent during fights. He will have to flank enemies and ensure that all the CC from the enemy teams' side is used up.
His first ability will be maxed out at level 9, allowing him to deal hefty amounts of damage in a very brief period.
He is pretty decent during team fights. He can completely decimate the enemy team if he manages to get a  Q reset off with his Ultimate  R activated.
powerSpikes.late:
A fully maxed out Ultimate  R will allow Master Yi to mow down the enemy team. This is highly beneficial when it comes to cleaning up late-game fights.
His damage will be massive during the late game. He can keep on all-in'ing enemies as his Ultimate  R will be up quite frequently.
His team fighting is on another level during this phase of the game. This means that he will be the pivot for his team's success, and his  Q usage will determine the game's outcome.

guideVi.strengths: MasterYi phù hợp với vai trò đi rừng, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận mạnh. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi linh hoạt và bộ công cụ gồm On-Hit, Aoe, Blink, Clearwave, Dash. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, MasterYi có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Yi Alpha Strike và Yi Highlander.
guideVi.weaknesses: MasterYi sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện mở giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 1 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đi rừng. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Yi Highlander theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Bảo toàn tài nguyên và đánh quanh carry. Giữ Yi Highlander cho giao tranh quyết định, không đi lẻ thiếu thông tin và tận dụng sức mạnh cuối trận để ép Baron hoặc Elder.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi MasterYi có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Yi Alpha Strike. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, MasterYi mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Yi Highlander là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của MasterYi được đánh giá mạnh. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp On-Hit, Aoe, Blink, Clearwave, Dash và sử dụng Yi Highlander đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guideVi.strengths: Mega Gnar phù hợp với vai trò đường trên, có nhịp đầu trận chưa rõ, giữa trận chưa rõ và cuối trận chưa rõ. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi linh hoạt và bộ công cụ gồm khả năng giao tranh cơ bản. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Mega Gnar có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Boulder Toss và GNAR!.
guideVi.weaknesses: Mega Gnar sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện mở giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường trên. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng GNAR! theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Mega Gnar có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Boulder Toss. Với đánh giá đầu trận chưa rõ, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Mega Gnar mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. GNAR! là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Mega Gnar được đánh giá chưa rõ. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp khả năng giao tranh cơ bản và sử dụng GNAR! đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths: Your W is your biggest strength. It can block incoming damage, which means it can block long-range executes and damage that can save your life.Mel’s Passive is quite strong, thanks to the execute element of it. You can execute enemies once they are below a certain threshold.She is the ultimate mage! She has good skill expression which suits any player who loves to throw out their abilities.
guide.weaknesses: She isn’t the strongest champion early and lacks a mobility tool, which makes her vulnerable to strong all-in champions as it can be hard for you to get them off you.You cannot use your Ultimate unless your Passive is applied to some enemies. It can also be challenging to get a good Ultimate off unless you have hit multiple enemies with your spells.It is very easy to waste your stacks or make a mistake by consuming them on the minion wave. This can be useful at times, but it might work against you while trying to trade.

gamePlan.early: In the early game, focus on farming and gaining gold and XP. You need some gold and items before you can start dishing out a lot of damage.You have good gank setup with your E, so you should look to poke the enemy down and then get your Jungler to gank you.Keep an eye on your Passive and try to use your empowered auto on the enemy champion whenever you can!
gamePlan.mid: In the mid-game, you should look to split push while picking up gold and buying items. Once you have core items, look to group with your team and team fight.During team fights, only use your W to counter major abilities like Ultimates. Limit using it unless you need to as you’re vulnerable while it’s on cooldown and the enemy team will engage while it’s down.Stick towards the back side of your team and look to poke the enemy down before committing to a fight.
gamePlan.late: In the late game, ensure you’re not wandering too far away from your team. If you get taken down, then the enemy could potentially end. Similarly, grouping with your team is essential as you might be able to get picks and finish the game.Continue to look for picks with your team on enemies who are out of position or walking around Summoner’s Rift alone.By the late game, you should be able to dish out a lot of damage, but you’ll still be vulnerable. Continue playing around your W and avoid fighting unless it’s up otherwise you will die and the enemy will force a fight while it’s down.

powerSpikes.early: Your first power spike is levels 3 and 4. When you put a point in ever ability, you are a bigger threat in lane. If you auto-attack them enemy after using your Q, you can deal a lot of damage at level 3 and 4.When you’ve completed your first component item after your first back, your damage output increases and you’ll have some damage to hit back at the enemy.Your third power spike in the lane is when you hit level 6. Your damage output will increase a lot more as your Ultimate also empowers your empowered autos, so you can deal extra damage in trades.
powerSpikes.mid: At level 9, Mel will max out her Q ability. Maxing out this ability allows her to deal a lot of damage in fights and will also help her clear waves!When she hits level 11, she will put a second point in her Ultimate. The more points she puts in her Ultimate, the better she will be as her Passive damage will also increase with every point in her Ultimate.During the mid-game, Mel would’ve completed several items, making her damage output much higher, which means she will be a bigger threat in team fights.
powerSpikes.late: In the late game, Mel will be full build. This means she should be dealing a lot of damage in fights, so group with your team.At level 16, Mel will put the final point in her Ultimate. At this stage, your Passive, empowered autos and your Ult will deal considerable damage in fights.Make sure you’re grouping with your team in the late game so you can deal tons of damage and abuse your full-build.

guideVi.strengths: Mel phù hợp với vai trò đường giữa, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng phản giao tranh, lối chơi kiểm soát bản đồ và bộ công cụ gồm Execute, Aoe, Clearwave, Invulnerability, Projectile. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Mel có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Radiant Volley và Golden Eclipse.
guideVi.weaknesses: Mel sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện phản giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường giữa, hỗ trợ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng phản giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Golden Eclipse theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Mel có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Radiant Volley. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Mel mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Golden Eclipse là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Mel được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Execute, Aoe, Clearwave, Invulnerability, Projectile và sử dụng Golden Eclipse đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Milio is the king of disengage and anti-engage. His Ultimate can protect his whole team versus engage and CC tools.
Milio also has a lot of utility tools. He has a heal, CC and shields!
His  Q has good poke and CC which will come in handy when poking the enemy. This mixed with his auto-attacks can offer him a lot of damage in lane.
guide.weaknesses:
Unfortunately, Milio has long cooldowns, especially with his Ultimate. It’s key that he doesn’t waste his abilities or else he will be an easy target.
Positioning can be hard for Milio as he can easily get killed and locked down with CC. If he gets CC’d he cannot use his Ultimate, so it’s important he never gets CC’d.
Furthermore, Milio is quite susceptible to CC. He is quite immobile and squishy, so positioning is key.

gamePlan.early:
Poke with your Q as much as you can, but focus on harassing with autos as much as you can. 
If you miss your Q, the enemy will just all-in you and kill you.
Your main focus in lane should be to peel and protect your ADC as much as 
possible. If you or they fall behind, it’s going to be harder for you to 
win the lane and the game.
Keep an eye on your positioning in lane. Try to adapt your positioning 
accordingly and play around where your ADC is stood at all times. If you’re 
too far back, they will struggle to farm and you’ll have no priority in 
lane.
gamePlan.mid:
Move to the mid lane and either stick with your ADC in the mid lane or hug 
your Mid laners hand to prevent the enemy from taking the mid lane tier 1.
Make sure you place vision around nearby lanes and objectives. If you can 
spot the enemy moving around the map, your team may be able to collapse on 
to them and get a free kill.
Avoid wandering too far away from your allies at any given time. If you get 
caught out, the enemy may be able to take a nearby objective like Baron, 
Dragon, a tower or even win a 5v4.
gamePlan.late:
As you’re a Support, avoid warding alone in the late game. If you get picked off, the enemy will be able to take nearby objectives or use their numbers advantage to win a team fight.
Consistently place vision around the map to help your team secure objectives and get picks. Having vision around the Baron and Dragon is needed to help your team to victory.
In the late game, make sure you’re with your team at all times. If you leave them, the enemy may start a fight without you being there to protect them and keep them alive.

powerSpikes.early:
You have strong poke in the early game with your auto-attacks and your  Q. Keep harassing the enemy from the get-go.
At level 3, you’ll have access to all your basic abilities. This is one of your first major powerspikes in the early game.
Your level 6 power spike is pretty major because it can help you and your ADC stay safe in lane.
powerSpikes.mid:
When you reach level 9, you’ll max out your first ability which is important for you in the laning phase.
At level 11 you’ll put your second point in your Ultimate. It will leave your Ultimate on a shorter cooldown and you’ll be stronger overall.
At level 13, you’ll max your next ability. As teams will be grouping at this stage of the game, you will be extremely useful with level 13 under your belt.
powerSpikes.late:
Putting the final skill point in your Ultimate at level 16 is a good power spike for you. Your Ultimate will be on its lowest cooldown and will be vital in helping your team win team fights.
Teams will be grouped in the late game, so you will truly shine at this stage of the game.
In the late game, you’ll have multiple items completed which is key. Your healing and survivability should be quite high in the late game.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Milio có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Ultra Mega Fire Kick. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.

powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Milio được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Airborne, Aoe, Sight, Slow, Stun và sử dụng Breath of Life đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Miss Fortune can melt enemies health bars with her  Q. This can often give her a huge early game advantage.
Her Ultimate  R is very strong in team fights. Getting one good Ultimate  R off could result in your team winning the game. It’s just important that you cast it from a safe place and out of immediate danger.
Has lots of poke in lane with her  E and  Q. This can give her a lot of pressure in the lane itself and let her bully the enemy down with ease.
guide.weaknesses:
This champion is pretty immobile and is prone to CC. If they get caught out by any CC, they will probably die. In particular, when she channels her Ultimate  R she is vulnerable.
Unlike a lot of ADC’s, she doesn’t have a dash or escape ability. This can be a huge problem for her throughout the game.
Miss Fortune isn’t very good in 1v1s and her outplay potential isn’t the best. Due to her Passive, she is rather weak in 1v1s unless she is ahead or can get a really good Ultimate  R off.

gamePlan.early:
Miss Fortune is a lane bully and should be played as such. Try to poke the enemy down with your  Q and  E during the laning phase.
After destroying the bottom lane tower, rotate to the mid lane and try to take that tower. This will open up the map and give your team a gold lead.
Play safe for the first few levels. You need time to come online and you shouldn’t be fighting unless you have a clear early advantage.
gamePlan.mid:
Stay with your Support throughout the mid-game. If you move away from them, you will be an easy target for the enemy. Make sure you’re always near at least 1 ally.
Group and stay with your team at all times. Do not split push or avoid grouping unless you have a good reason to be away from them.
Look for picks with your Support/Jungler to get kills and increase your lead. If you kill a key target, you could make the call for Baron.
gamePlan.late:
It is important that you stick with your team in the late game. Do not move around the map or go anywhere unless someone is with you.
Stand towards the back end of your team near your Support. Avoid walking too far away from anyone in the late game. Getting caught out will result in the enemy being able to push their advantage and finish the game.
Watch your positioning in the late game. Focus on kiting and auto-attacking the nearest enemy champion. Avoid walking too far forward so you do not get caught out and focused by the enemy.

powerSpikes.early:
Her first back is when she will get her initial power spike. Till then, Miss Fortune should be playing safely and should just try to land her ricocheted  Q on enemies behind low health minions.
Level six is a massive power spike as it allows Miss Fortune to impact fights massively. It is also a decent finishing move, especially in clumped fights.
Her first item component will increase her dueling potential significantly. Her ability to dish out damage in the lane will also skyrocket.
powerSpikes.mid:
Once she has 2 points in her Ultimate  R, she will easily be able to take over team fights and disrupt them as well. Her positioning will be the defining factor from now.
Her first ability will be maxed out at level 9. This will significantly boost her damage and will let her one-shot squishies.
Miss Fortune excels at team fights. This is due to her Ultimate  R and Passive combined with her kiting potential. She just needs some peeling to become a demon in team fights.
powerSpikes.late:
Three points in her Ultimate  R will give her a massive power spike. The ability will dish out a lot of damage and have a very short cooldown, so team fights will be frequent.
Her life steal combined with her damage and mobility during the late game will make her really good in team fights. She will just need to maintain proper positioning.
She will have multiple items during this phase of the game. It will allow her to dish out tons of damage and one-shot squishy champions. Prolonged team fights will see her winning effortlessly.

guideVi.strengths: MissFortune phù hợp với vai trò xạ thủ, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận mạnh, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng phản giao tranh, lối chơi kiểm soát bản đồ và bộ công cụ gồm Burst Dame, Clearwave, On-hit, Poke, Bonus AS. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, MissFortune có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Fortune Double Up và Fortune Bullet Time.
guideVi.weaknesses: MissFortune sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện phản giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 1 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Chủ động tạo lợi thế ở xạ thủ, hỗ trợ. Trao đổi khi Fortune Double Up sẵn sàng, đẩy nhịp trước đối thủ và chuyển quyền ưu tiên sang sông hoặc rừng.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng phản giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Fortune Bullet Time theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi MissFortune có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Fortune Double Up. Với đánh giá đầu trận mạnh, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, MissFortune mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Fortune Bullet Time là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của MissFortune được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Burst Dame, Clearwave, On-hit, Poke, Bonus AS và sử dụng Fortune Bullet Time đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Really strong dueling potential in the lane thanks to his  W. This ability allows him to both block damage as well as heal himself by a respectable amount.
Post-six, he can select any target and convert the fight into a 1 v 1. This can mean hell for any immobile or low health enemy carry as Mordekaiser can easily  E> Q them.
Once he gets enough items, he will be nearly unkillable unless the enemy team focuses him down. In a team fight, his  E can be extremely beneficial when fighting against clumped enemy teams.
guide.weaknesses:
Quite immobile, which can lead to him being camped a lot during the laning phase. Once set back during the early game, he won’t be able to dish out a lot of damage.
On missing his  E, Mordekaiser’s opponents can easily all-in and engage on him. This is because he won’t be able to displace the enemy team, and the carries will be able to freely all-in him.
Early Grievous Wounds can reduce his  W damage by a lot. This will help his enemy even out the duels during the early game.

gamePlan.early:
Play safe for the first few levels. You need time to come online and you shouldn’t be fighting unless you have a clear early advantage.
Once you have a few levels under your belt, you can start to play aggressive and look for aggressive plays. You benefit from extended trades, so try to go for them frequently.
Keep the minion wave closer to your side of the map throughout the early game. This is the best place for the wave to be as it offers you tons of extra protection.
gamePlan.mid:
Split push during the mid-game and try to secure side objectives. Avoid grouping if possible.
Use your strong duelling potential in the mid-game to fight and duel anyone who tries to stop you from split pushing.
Although you’re a really strong split pusher in the mid-game, be prepared to group with your team and fight 5v5. You should usually start grouping when there are no nearby objectives to take.
gamePlan.late:
Do not fight in the late game unless your Ultimate  R is up. It is crucial that you only commit or look for fights when it is available as you’re going to miss out on a lot of potential kill pressure.
Your Ultimate  R will be on a shorter cooldown in the later stages of the game. If you can find an opportunity to do so, use it to catch out someone who is isolated and alone, too far forward or way out of position.
Peel for your carries to keep them alive for longer. If your allies die quickly, there will be little chance that you will win the team fight.

powerSpikes.early:
Mordekaiser will take some time to be really overpowering in the lane, so he will need to play safely for that duration. Conserving health is the way to go.
Level 6 is a massive spike for Mordekaiser as he can now use his Ultimate  R and 1 v 1 anyone he desires.
The first item component will allow him to fight more efficiently. His damage will be pretty significant as well.
powerSpikes.mid:
Multiple items during this phase of the game will allow him to fight enemies effectively. His damage will be pretty significant now.
Another point in his Ultimate  R will make him have a lot of pick potential. He can easily lurk around the map and 1 v 1 squishy targets.
His first ability will be maxed out at level 9. It will grant him increased damage and survivability, and now he will be a massive threat to the enemy team.
powerSpikes.late:
Another point in his Ultimate  R will allow him to 1 v 1 target quite frequently. He should be able to secure picks even now.
He is pretty decent during late-game fights, as his AoE abilities will hurt a lot. His survivability is quite appreciable as well.
His tankiness will be massive during this phase of the game. He should be focused on absorbing a lot of damage for the enemy team while simultaneously picking off enemies when possible.

guideVi.strengths: Mordekaiser phù hợp với vai trò đường trên, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi đẩy lẻ và bộ công cụ gồm Clearwave, On-Hit, Aoe, Burst Dame, Heal. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Mordekaiser có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Obliterate và Realm of Death.
guideVi.weaknesses: Mordekaiser sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện mở giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường trên. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Tạo áp lực cánh, giữ đường đẩy và chỉ nhập đội khi mục tiêu lớn hoặc giao tranh chắc chắn xảy ra. Luôn giữ đường rút trước khi đẩy sâu.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Mordekaiser có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Obliterate. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Mordekaiser mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Realm of Death là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Mordekaiser được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Clearwave, On-Hit, Aoe, Burst Dame, Heal và sử dụng Realm of Death đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Really good waveclear with her W. This can allow her to shove the wave really quickly and then help her 
Jungler on different occasions.
Her Q helps her with gank set-ups, and picks during the mid-game. The root 
duration can easily allow her to hide in a Jungle brush and wait for her 
target to wander into her Q range.
The E can allow her to make one of her carries or herself invincible to CC for a 
while. This is really beneficial during team fights, or when laning against 
heavy CC.
guide.weaknesses:
Her Q can be blocked by minions. If the enemy is positioning well throughout the 
laning phase, it will be very hard for you to land this ability.
Misuse of her E can lead her to many nasty situations which are potentially lethal for 
her. This is especially true if her opponent has some form of hard CC.
Missing her Q can give her enemies a long time window to harass her freely. That ability 
is quite easy to dodge if she tries to land it from vision or from maximum 
range.

gamePlan.early:
During the laning phase, focus on poking the enemy down to gain a health 
advantage. When the enemy is low, commit to an all-in.
Look for picks and favourable trades with your Q. Only use your Q if you’re guaranteed to hit it. If you throw it out and it misses, you 
will have no pressure in the lane and will be rather vulnerable.
After destroying the bottom lane tower, rotate to the mid lane and try to 
take that tower. This will open up the map and give your team a gold lead.
gamePlan.mid:
As a Support, you’re quite vulnerable and can easily be killed when going 
to ward, when you’re moving around the map, and when you’re alone. To 
reduce the chances of dying and getting caught out of position, try and 
stick with your team at all times.
Keep a constant eye on what major objective is spawning next. If it’s 
spawning soon, make sure you place vision around the objective as quickly 
and as safely as possible before retreating to safety. Having vision around 
major objectives is key.
Look for picks during the mid-game. If you can pick someone off with the 
help from your allies, you can abuse their death timer to earn more gold 
and possibly take a tower, an objective or get more kills.
gamePlan.late:
Ward major objectives and place vision in high traffic areas in the late 
stages of the game. Keep them warded so you can see the enemy move around 
the map and see them starting the objective.
Stay with your team at all times. Avoid moving around the map alone so you 
do not get caught out. Getting caught out will result in your team having 
to play 4v5. Do not ward alone unless you know where the enemy is.
Peel for your allies as much as possible. Keeping them alive for as long as 
possible in team fights is a must in order to win the game.

powerSpikes.early:
Level 3 is a massive power spike for Morgana as she will be able to both CC 
enemies, deal a decent amount of damage to them, and save her allies from 
CC when required.
Level 6 is a massive power spike as she will be able to team fight way more 
efficiently once she gets her Ultimate R. Just make sure that you E your primary carry before diving into the enemy team.
Her warding quest completion is a power spike for her team. She will set a 
lot of vision around the map, effortlessly helping her allies avoid ganks 
and roams.
powerSpikes.mid:
Morgana is quite decent in team fights as she will be able to run down 
enemies with her Q and Ultimate R. Her E will allow her to ave her allies from hard CC and engages.
Adding 2 points in her Ultimate R will give her a massive power spike. She will be able to use the ability 
frequently, impacting team fights often.
At level nine, her Q will be maxed out. It will let her get frequent picks on the enemy, 
especially from the fog of war.
powerSpikes.late:
During this phase of the game, Morgana will have multiple items which will 
allow her to protect her team. Combined with her E, her allies will be immune from CC.
A fully maxed out Ultimate R will allow her to use the ability quite frequently and dish out a lot of 
damage at the same time. It will be great during clumped fights.
She is excellent in late-game fights due to her overall utility and CC on 
her Q. That CC can easily be chained with her Ultimate R for maximal effectiveness.

guideVi.strengths: Morgana phù hợp với vai trò đi rừng, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng phản giao tranh, lối chơi bắt lẻ và bộ công cụ gồm Heal, Poke, Root, TeamFight, Disengage. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Morgana có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Dark Binding và Soul Shackles.
guideVi.weaknesses: Morgana sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện phản giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 1 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đi rừng, hỗ trợ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng phản giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Soul Shackles theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Morgana có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Dark Binding. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Morgana mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Soul Shackles là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Morgana được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Heal, Poke, Root, TeamFight, Disengage và sử dụng Soul Shackles đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Naafari is really good at executing and taking down squishy champions who 
are walking alone on the map.
You are a very mobile champion which can allow you to engage or escape 
sticky scenarios.
Naafari is a snowball heavy champion. Getting an early kill can enable her 
to take over the map.
guide.weaknesses:
As suggested, she is a snowball heavy champion, so if you do not get an 
early lead, it will be hard to carry later on.
She suffers against teams that are smart and group together. It makes it 
riskier for you to go in alone, and you need your allies to go in with you.
She can be kited pretty well after she has gone in. It can be hard to 
handle champions with dashes or escape tools.

gamePlan.early:
Start looking for roams after pushing the wave. You can start roaming after 
level 6.
Play around your Ultimate and look for kills whenever it is up.
Don’t forget to keep good objective control! Gank the bottom lane and then 
rotate to Drake.
gamePlan.mid:
Go in a side lane and start applying pressure to towers while your team 
does the same.
Ensure you’re also using your Ultimate and constantly looking for ganks 
with it.
Supports will start walking around the map alone in the mid-game. 
Capitalise on this to get yourself free kills.
gamePlan.late:
In the late game, flank the enemy and stick near your teammates. You should 
look to go in with them in late-game team fights.
Continue to look for picks on the enemy Support as they go to ward alone in 
the late game. This is especially true when objectives are about to spawn.
Focus on team fighting with your allies, and avoid splitting up too much or 
else they’ll get collapsed on and you’ll lose the fight.

powerSpikes.early:
Your first power spike is at level 3 when you unlock all 3 of your basic 
abilities. You can start looking to fight at level 3 onwards.
When you unlock your Ultimate, roaming and all-ins will be easier and 
you’ll be more of a threat.
After you’ve completed your first component item, you’ll be quite strong in 
1v1s and have a higher chance of getting kills.
powerSpikes.mid:
At level 9, you’ll max your first ability which makes you a lot stronger in 
skirmishes.
You are a good mid-game champion, and you’ll be able to easily take down 
squishy champions in the mid game.
At this stage of the game, you would’ve had multiple items completed, so 
you will naturally be quite strong.
powerSpikes.late:
At level 16, you’ll put the third and final point in your Ultimate. You 
will be rather strong and your all-in potential will be high.
In the late game, you’ll start to fall off a bit as teams will be grouped 
so you need to play with your team. The enemy grouping together will reduce 
your chances of getting picks.
Naturally, you’ll have many items completed, or are full build at this 
stage of the game, so you should be able to deal a lot of damage and 
survive fights.
