Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường trên, đi rừng, đường giữa. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Lets Bounce! theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Zac có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Stretching Strikes. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Zac mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Lets Bounce! là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Zac được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Heal, Resurrection, Airborne, Clearwave, Reset và sử dụng Lets Bounce! đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Can catch enemies unaware with his WEQ combo, especially when the enemy is busy last hitting a minion. This combo 
does a lot of damage and can force the enemy to play defensively.
His W allows him to escape from sticky situations and ganks with ease. It also 
allows him to set-up kills for himself once he has managed to poke his 
enemy down.
His Passive allows him to finish off low health enemies with ease. When 
combined with his W, he becomes a really strong roamer who can camp lanes with squishy targets.
guide.weaknesses:
Once he uses his W offensively, he won’t have any other form of escape left to him. This 
leaves him vulnerable to ganks and baits from the enemy team.
His Ultimate R does no bonus damage to an enemy target if he misses his abilities on 
them, or if his entire damage is absorbed by a shield.
It becomes hard for him to secure kills later in the game due to every 
enemy building defensive items and peeling for their carries. Team fights 
are not his cup of tea and hence he has to resort to split pushing, leaving 
the enemy team at a numbers advantage.

gamePlan.early:
Your goal in the laning phase is to abuse the enemy and get kills. Try to 
play aggressive when suitable to get an early lead.
Use your strong 1v1 potential to roam around the map and help your allies 
secure kills. If you can get kills and help your allies, your chances of 
winning the game will be much higher.
Once your allies have rotated to the mid lane, rotate to a different lane 
and split push. It’s important that you do not fall behind in CS and XP by 
staying mid when there are lots of other champions there.
gamePlan.mid:
Flank in team fights to make getting on the enemy backline easily. Make 
sure you’re near your team at all times so you can get in the fight fast.
After your bot lane has moved to the mid lane, rotate to the bot side of 
the map or somewhere else on the map so you can continue to farm and gain 
XP. 
As you’re good at getting picks and killing isolated targets, try to ambush 
and assassinate enemies who are alone or walking around Summoners Rift 
alone. After killing someone, make the call for a nearby objective.
gamePlan.late:
In the late game, look for picks on immobile or miss positioned enemies. 
Taking someone down in the late game can give you enough time to force a 
fight, siege an objective or take the Baron or Elder Dragon.
If the enemy is grouping, look to group with your team too. In team fights, 
continue to focus the squishiest and easiest to kill high priority targets 
in the backline.
Flank in team fights to make getting on the enemy backline easily. Make 
sure you’re near your team at all times so you can get in the fight fast.

powerSpikes.early:
The first item procurement will make Zed a deadly champion to deal with. He 
should be looking to roam to other lanes and clean up kills on 
low-health/overstaying enemies.
Level 3 is a decent power spike as Zed will now have access to his overall 
burst combo. He can quickly go for short burst trades and proc his runes 
with these abilities. He can spam them quite fast as well since he is not 
dependent on mana.
Level 6 is a significant power spike for Zed. This is where he unlocks his 
full potential and can make the plays and the moves to make enemies wonder 
what that was. He should also be able to dive low health enemies and escape 
unscathed.
powerSpikes.mid:
Zed has an effortless time killing anyone who is wandering alone in the rift. He can also set up tower dives on squishy bot laners quite frequently. He just needs to shove his wave in before roaming.
At level 11, Zed will have two points in his Ultimate  R. This means that his one-shot potential will be increased massively, and he will be able to destroy isolated enemies with ease.
At level 9, Zed will have his first ability maxed out. This means that he will be dealing tons of damage to the enemy target, mainly if he uses his Ultimate  R on someone.
powerSpikes.late:
This is the point of the game where Zed will have a lot of difficulty 
taking enemies down. This is because enemies will buy defensive items from 
now. Still, Zed should try to go for isolated targets when possible.
At level 16, he will have his Ultimate R maxed out. This means that he will deal massive amounts of damage to 
squishier targets and will decimate anyone who has been caught out alone/
Zed will have really low cooldowns now, and he can deal a lot of damage due 
to that. This means that he will be the bane of squishier targets on the 
enemy team, and he can get rid of them quickly.

guideVi.strengths: Zed phù hợp với vai trò đi rừng, đường giữa, có nhịp đầu trận mạnh, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận yếu. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi linh hoạt và bộ công cụ gồm Burst Dame, Clearwave, Aoe, Poke, Blink. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Zed có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Razor Shuriken và Death Mark.
guideVi.weaknesses: Zed sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện mở giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 3 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn cuối trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Chủ động tạo lợi thế ở đi rừng, đường giữa. Trao đổi khi Razor Shuriken sẵn sàng, đẩy nhịp trước đối thủ và chuyển quyền ưu tiên sang sông hoặc rừng.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Death Mark theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Zed có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Razor Shuriken. Với đánh giá đầu trận mạnh, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Zed mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Death Mark là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Zed được đánh giá yếu. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Burst Dame, Clearwave, Aoe, Poke, Blink và sử dụng Death Mark đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Good versus team compositions with lots of shields.
Her E allows her to escape sticky situations and get away from ganks easily.
Zeri’s versatile. She can either go AP or AD depending on her team’s needs.
guide.weaknesses:
Unique mechanic with her Q and basic attacks. This can be hard to master.
She is pretty weak from behind, but then again so are many other champions. 
If you get a good early lead, you can easily snowball though.
Her E is her only movement spell, and it has a really long cooldown compared to 
other champions who are played in the same lane.

gamePlan.early:
Early game is pretty simple where you will want to ensure that you can land 
as many charged shots on the enemy as you possibly can. Always use the lane 
brushes to land your W on the enemy.
Working with your Support is important in this game. Your W can easily set your Support up to make plays which can lead to multiple 
kills for you.
Once you get your Ultimate R, you should always try to take part in clustered fights. Along with your E, you can make massive game-changing plays.
gamePlan.mid:
During the mid-game, you will want to switch lanes and use your E with extreme discretion. Also, please make sure that you use it on the 
proper terrain else you may end up landing right into the enemy team's lap.
Getting your core items should help you a lot and will make your Q hit like a truck. Make sure you use it regularly along with your charged 
attacks.
Although you are mobile, make sure that you don't chase an enemy into their 
Jungle. You are still an ADC and need to help your team win fights rather 
than chasing with your E.
gamePlan.late:
Be a part of as many fights as you can during this phase of the game. Your Q and W should make life easy for your team.
Do not ignore the terrain aspect of your W. It can come in really handy during situations where you are fighting 
around choke points.
Your Ultimate R will be game-changing so make sure you have your E ready to escape or dash after casting the ability. It will catch the enemy 
off-guard.

powerSpikes.early:
Zeri’s first power spike is at level 3 when she unlocks each of her basic 
abilities. She will be relatively strong at level 3.
Her next power spike will generally be once she unlocks her first component 
item as it allows her to go for more favourable trades with the enemy laner.
At level 6, Zeri will unlock her Ultimate R. This is a good spike for Zeri and it will allow her to win all-ins even 
in the hardest of matchups.
powerSpikes.mid:
Her level 11 power spike is pretty strong. 2 points in her Ultimate  R offer Zeri a lot of additional kill pressure.
During the mid-game, Zeri would’ve picked up several items. She will deal a lot of damage in fights and be able to solo carry them if she is ahead at this stage of the game.
At level 9, Zeri will max out her  Q ability. As she uses this ability the most, her “autos” will deal a lot of damage.
powerSpikes.late:
At level 16, Zeri will put the final point in her Ultimate R. Her Ultimate R will now deal maximum damage in fights.
Team fights are really where she shines. Depending on her build, she will 
be really strong and can deal a ton of damage in a fight.
In the late game, she should be near full build. As long as she positions 
well and kites, she will be very good in team fights.

guideVi.strengths: Zeri phù hợp với vai trò xạ thủ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng mở giao tranh, lối chơi kiểm soát bản đồ và bộ công cụ gồm Dps, Clearwave, On-hit, Imba, Aoe. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Zeri có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Burst Fire và Lightning Crash.
guideVi.weaknesses: Zeri sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện mở giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở xạ thủ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng mở giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Lightning Crash theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Zeri có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Burst Fire. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Zeri mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Lightning Crash là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Zeri được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Dps, Clearwave, On-hit, Imba, Aoe và sử dụng Lightning Crash đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Tremendous wave clearing potential with a lot of poke built in his kit. His Q alone can force the enemy to recall back to base if they keep getting 
tagged by it.
Can displace enemy units into his E by using his W. This can act as a really good finishing move against low health enemies, 
or it can be used to pull off an escape when necessary.
Is a menace to recall against as one bad recall can allow him to take the 
enemy tower really quickly due to his Passive and W.
guide.weaknesses:
Vulnerable when his W is down as he has no other escape ability left in his kit. The same 
applies for when he is too pushed up in the lane.
His Q can be dodged quite easily if the enemy is standing at some distance from 
him. It is his main form of poke damage, so without it he will be useless.
Level one Ultimate R does very little damage if the enemy is away from the epicenter of the 
blast. It cannot be used as an effective finishing move unless Ziggs has 
items or two points in that ability.

gamePlan.early:
Keep poking the enemy with your Q and use the lane brushes to get a massive advantage on the enemy. Try to 
hit both the wave and the enemy at the same time.
Poking out the enemy will be your top priority. Killing them doesn't matter 
but ensure that you don't let them respond to any fights happening in the 
river.
Neutral objective fights will be easily won by you if you use your Q and W carefully. Ensure that the choke points are covered up and chunk the 
enemies out.
gamePlan.mid:
Swap to the mid-lane as quickly as you can. This will allow you to get a 
lot of map control, and your ability to siege will be pretty respectable as 
well.
Once you get your core items, you should be able to dish out a lot of 
damage in a brief moment. If you manage to catch someone out with your W and E, they are as good as dead.
Utilize your W and E properly when trying to fight for a neutral objective. Your Q can easily be spammed by you, so use it regularly.
gamePlan.late:
During the late game, you will function mainly as a siege-based mage. Focus 
on taking towers quickly and open up the map. This will make it really easy 
for you to control the game state.
Being full build will let you blow up enemies with ease. All you need to do 
is combo them properly with your W, E, and Ultimate R. This strategy is best used in neutral, objective fights.
Use the fog of war to catch enemies off-guard. You can work with your 
Support and the Jungler to set up death brushes for the enemies.

powerSpikes.early:
His Q is his foremost poke ability, and it is pretty reliable, so adding more 
points in it will directly boost his overall damage in the lane. It will 
let him decimate his opposition, primarily when he uses the ability from a 
brush.
The first item component will allow him to spam his abilities consistently 
due to his increased mana pool. It will also increase his overall damage, 
which will enable him to completely take over the lane as his waveclear is 
impeccable.
Ziggs is relatively weak early on when compared to other ADCs. This is 
because he is ability reliant than traditional ADCs who are auto-attack 
reliant. This can cause him to run out of mana quickly and be useless in 
the lane. To compensate for this, he should use the lane brushes to zone 
enemies off. It isn't necessary to use the abilities as the threat is 
enough to keep enemies at bay.
powerSpikes.mid:
Ziggs is really in good team fights as it will allow him to thoroughly poke 
his opposition out with his Q. He can even do it from the fog of war for maximal effect.
At level 9, Ziggs' Q will be maxed out. That ability has a huge hitbox, and he can easily keep 
poking and sieging the enemy out of the lane.
At level 11, Ziggs will have two points in an Ultimate R. This will give him a massive boost in his overall burst damage and catch 
enemies off-guard quite easily. It will also allow him to snipe kills from 
far away.
powerSpikes.late:
As Ziggs gets more items, he will be causing a lot of mayhem in terms of 
damage. This means that Ziggs can easily poke enemies out to make the team 
fights massively unfair for the enemy.
Once Ziggs gets three points in his Ultimate R, he will deal a massive amount of damage in a huge area during team and 
objective fights. Fighting in clumped areas will give a tremendous 
advantage to Ziggs as well.
Ziggs is quite good at taking towers quickly. Still, as he gets more items, 
he will completely decimate them with his Passive empowered auto-attacks. 
After that, he can just chunk the tower out with his W, which means that the enemy can't do anything to defend their tower.

guideVi.strengths: Ziggs phù hợp với vai trò đường giữa, xạ thủ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận trung bình và cuối trận mạnh. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng cấu rỉa, lối chơi đẩy lẻ và bộ công cụ gồm Bonus Dame, Aoe, Clearwave, Poke, Airborne. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Ziggs có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Bouncing Bomb và Mega Inferno Bomb.
guideVi.weaknesses: Ziggs sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện cấu rỉa hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường giữa, xạ thủ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Tạo áp lực cánh, giữ đường đẩy và chỉ nhập đội khi mục tiêu lớn hoặc giao tranh chắc chắn xảy ra. Luôn giữ đường rút trước khi đẩy sâu.
gamePlan.late: Bảo toàn tài nguyên và đánh quanh carry. Giữ Mega Inferno Bomb cho giao tranh quyết định, không đi lẻ thiếu thông tin và tận dụng sức mạnh cuối trận để ép Baron hoặc Elder.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Ziggs có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Bouncing Bomb. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Ziggs mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Mega Inferno Bomb là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Ziggs được đánh giá mạnh. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Bonus Dame, Aoe, Clearwave, Poke, Airborne và sử dụng Mega Inferno Bomb đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
His QWQ combo can allow him to stun a group of enemies which is highly beneficial 
in close-quarter combat. His scalings are quite high as well so he can deal 
a lot of damage through that combo.
His Ultimate R, when used properly, is one of the most obnoxious and overpowered 
abilities in the game. That combined with his E can make one of his carries nearly uncatchable and unkillable.
His E allows him to guarantee a QWQ hit on a specified target. This can be highly beneficial in setting a 
death brush before a major objective fight.
guide.weaknesses:
Pre-six he is quite squishy, and easily killable if his E is on cooldown. This also makes him vulnerable to crowd control, 
especially when he is trying to poke with his Q.
His Q is quite telegraphed and he can be easily punished once his Q is down. Again, his Q can also be dodge by blinking/dashing away from the drop point of his Q.
He is pretty much a poke/damage bot when his Ultimate R is down. Zilean is inherently squishy so it should not be an issue to take 
him down once his Ultimate R is on cooldown.

gamePlan.early:
Get level 2 first and look for a favourable trade. Gaining an early health 
lead is key to getting a kill later on down the line. Level 2 in the bottom 
lane is the first minion wave followed by the next 3 melee minions.
Your goal during the laning phase is so to look for kills and abuse the 
enemy as often as you can. Try to play aggressive frequently to gain a lead.
After destroying the bottom lane tower, rotate to the mid lane and try to 
take that tower. This will open up the map and give your team a gold lead.
gamePlan.mid:
As a Support, you’re quite vulnerable and can easily be killed when going 
to ward, when you’re moving around the map, and when you’re alone. To 
reduce the chances of dying and getting caught out of position, try and 
stick with your team at all times.
Keep a constant eye on what major objective is spawning next. If it’s 
spawning soon, make sure you place vision around the objective as quickly 
and as safely as possible before retreating to safety. Having vision around 
major objectives is key.
Look for picks in the mid-game. You deal lots of damage and can easily blow 
champions up. Try to kill someone and then abuse their death timer to earn 
more gold.
gamePlan.late:
Ward major objectives and place vision in high traffic areas in the late 
stages of the game. Keep them warded so you can see the enemy move around 
the map and see them starting the objective.
Stay with your team at all times. Avoid moving around the map alone so you 
do not get caught out. Getting caught out will result in your team having 
to play 4v5. Do not ward alone unless you know where the enemy is.
Peel for your allies as much as possible. Keeping them alive for as long as 
possible in team fights is a must in order to win the game.

powerSpikes.early:
Zilean's level 6 is a significant power spike and will let him save his ADC 
and himself quite a few times in the game. It makes the enemy's job 
extremely difficult, and the added layer of protection is perfect.
Once Zilean gets all his abilities, his all-in and defensive capabilities 
skyrocket. His Q > W > Q combo is already potent. That combined with his E will make him or his ADC nearly uncatchable.
Getting his first item will increase Zilean's poke damage by a considerable 
margin. He can try to one-shot enemies independently, and his ADC can just 
focus on farming and going for finishing kills.
powerSpikes.mid:
Zilean's Ultimate R will be a lifesaver and will allow him to save key targets during 
significant fights. He will just have to ensure that he uses it correctly 
(most fed target).
Zilean will have multiple items by now, which will allow him to deal a lot 
of damage and use his Ultimate R frequently. The shorter cooldowns will undoubtedly make life obnoxious for 
the enemy team.
At level 11, he will have two points in his Ultimate R. This means that it will be more powerful and have a lower cooldown at the 
same time. This will be a massive spike for him.
powerSpikes.late:
Zilean should stick to his team like glue as his Ultimate R will cause the enemy team's downfall, provided he uses the ability 
correctly. The lower cooldown will certainly make extended fights a breeze 
for Zilean's team.
Zilean will max out his Ultimate R at level 16. This will allow him to have a minuscule cooldown on his 
Ultimate R. In contrast, the health with which the Ultimate R'd target respawns will increase. 
He will have all his items by this point of the game. This means that his 
damage output will be massive, especially when it comes to his Q > W > Q combo. A single Q on a squishy target can easily chunk them out.

guideVi.strengths: Zilean phù hợp với vai trò đường giữa, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận mạnh. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng phản giao tranh, lối chơi kiểm soát bản đồ và bộ công cụ gồm Exp, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave, Sight. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Zilean có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Time Bomb và Chronoshift.
guideVi.weaknesses: Zilean sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện phản giao tranh hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường giữa, hỗ trợ. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng phản giao tranh. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Chronoshift theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Bảo toàn tài nguyên và đánh quanh carry. Giữ Chronoshift cho giao tranh quyết định, không đi lẻ thiếu thông tin và tận dụng sức mạnh cuối trận để ép Baron hoặc Elder.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Zilean có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Time Bomb. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Zilean mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Chronoshift là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Zilean được đánh giá mạnh. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Exp, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave, Sight và sử dụng Chronoshift đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
Can one-shot squishies as soon as she gets her Ultimate R. Getting hit by her E is a death sentence post-six, and her Ultimate’s R mobility allows her to dodge skillshots.
Her W is a powerhouse and can allow her to provide a lot of utility for both her 
team and herself. This ability can allow her to win the lane quite easily 
if she gets lucky.
Zoe’s E can be used to set-up ganks from a long-range. The proper usage of terrain 
can help her roam to other lanes and get free kills with her EQ combo.
guide.weaknesses:
Her early laning is lackluster and she can be exploited quite easily due to 
the lack of mobility in her kit.
Missing her E will make her vulnerable, especially before she hits level six. This will 
make her really weak against any enemy who has a dash or blink in their kit.
Quite vulnerable to ganks when she is pushed up and has no spell picked up 
due to her W. Once crowd controlled, she has no form of escape as her Ultimate R will just blink her back to the original recast location.

gamePlan.early:
Your goal throughout the laning phase is to poke and harass the enemy in 
lane. You have a lot of poke, so try to poke the enemy down as often as you 
can.
Play safe for the first few levels while you land poke on the enemy with 
your Q. Once they’re low enough, you can commit to an all-in.
Once you’ve hit level 6 and purchased key component items, look to harass 
and constantly push the enemy into their tower. This will allow you to earn 
turret plating and increase your gold income.
gamePlan.mid:
After your bot lane has moved to the mid lane, rotate to the bot side of 
the map or somewhere else on the map so you can continue to farm and gain 
XP. 
Try and siege objectives with your team during the mid-game. You have 
strong poking tools which will allow you to siege objectives with ease. Try 
to poke the enemy down as much as possible while your team tries to take 
towers (or the Dragon or Baron).
Delay team fights for as long as possible while you harass the enemy and 
poke them down with your Q.
gamePlan.late:
Stick with your team in the late game. Do not split up or walk away from 
them otherwise the enemy may try to pick you off or initiate a 4v5 fight 
when you’re away from your team.
Look for picks with your abilities. Picking someone off with your E and then collapsing on them to take them down is a great way of winning a 
team fight and ending the game. Look for picks on isolated targets if 
possible.
Keep a constant eye on you and your allies positioning. You need to poke 
the enemy down and delay fights in the late game, but you need to watch 
your positioning as you move forward to harass. Do not get picked off by 
trying to harass and poke the enemy down.

powerSpikes.early:
Level 6 is a significant powerspike as it directly empowers Zoe's  Q, and grants her more creative ways to  E her target. The only thing to be kept in mind is that this ability is not an escape tool.
Her first component will undoubtedly allow her to deal more damage in the lane and cast her spells with a higher frequency due to the increased mana pool. It will also increase the overall damage output during a significant fight.
An RNG component of her powerspike includes which spell she picks up with her  W. For instance, if she picks up an Ignite, it will increase her overall offensive capabilities, while picking up a Locket will increase her team play and survivability.
powerSpikes.mid:
At level 9, her  Q will be maxed out completely. Being her main damage ability, she will now be able to chunk out enemies with ease.
Zoe won't spike too hard at level 11 because it doesn't really do anything for her. She will still have to rely on using the terrain to  E her opponents and then blow them up with her  Q.
Once Zoe hits level thirteen, she will have increased pick potential due to her  E being completely maxed out. It will make her extremely deadly in the fog of war.
powerSpikes.late:
Zoe should have many items by now, which means that one-shotting squishies is now available on the menu. She just needs to hit one of them with her  E.
Due to the low cooldown on her abilities, she will consistently land poke on her enemies. Her empowered auto-attacks will hit like a truck.
She won't be spiking too hard at level 16 as it will just reduce the cooldown of the Ultimate  R and do nothing significantly powerful. This means that she will be able to kill people quickly, though.

guideVi.strengths: Zoe phù hợp với vai trò đường giữa, có nhịp đầu trận trung bình, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng cấu rỉa, lối chơi bắt lẻ và bộ công cụ gồm Non-Projectile, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave, Imba. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Zoe có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Paddle Star và Portal Jump.
guideVi.weaknesses: Zoe sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện cấu rỉa hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 3 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Ưu tiên farm và giữ máu ở đường giữa. Chỉ trao đổi khi có đủ kỹ năng, tránh đẩy cao không có tầm nhìn và chờ mốc trang bị hoặc cấp độ đầu tiên.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng cấu rỉa. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Portal Jump theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Zoe có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Paddle Star. Với đánh giá đầu trận trung bình, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Zoe mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Portal Jump là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Zoe được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Non-Projectile, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave, Imba và sử dụng Portal Jump đúng giao tranh quyết định.

guide.strengths:
More than often you can turn a gank right on its head with proper W placement along with the usage of your Q or E. Use E if the enemy ganker has some form of Movement Speed ability with which 
they can gap close quickly.
Poking is your main power in the lane and it is really obnoxious during the 
early game. With your poke, you can quite easily zone the enemy laners off 
without even getting close to them.
Your brush power is unparalleled and one rotation of your spells on an 
unsuspecting enemy will force them to play defensively. Don’t try to play 
too passively and always be on the lookout to land a multi-man E.
guide.weaknesses:
Your immobility is your greatest weakness on Zyra. Therefore, you should 
always be conscious of your positioning in lane and in team fights.
During a fight, always stay at a distance and avoid crowd control 
abilities. Once locked down, you won’t be able to do anything to save 
yourself and will most probably get killed if the enemy follows up on you.
Missing your E places you in a very vulnerable position, so only try to land it when you 
can guarantee a hit.

gamePlan.early:
Get level 2 first and look for a favourable trade. Gaining an early health 
lead is key to getting a kill later on down the line. Level 2 in the bottom 
lane is the first minion wave followed by the next 3 melee minions.
Your goal during the laning phase is so to look for kills and abuse the 
enemy as often as you can. Try to play aggressive frequently to gain a lead.
After destroying the bottom lane tower, rotate to the mid lane and try to 
take that tower. This will open up the map and give your team a gold lead.
gamePlan.mid:
As a Support, you’re quite vulnerable and can easily be killed when going 
to ward, when you’re moving around the map, and when you’re alone. To 
reduce the chances of dying and getting caught out of position, try and 
stick with your team at all times.
Keep a constant eye on what major objective is spawning next. If it’s 
spawning soon, make sure you place vision around the objective as quickly 
and as safely as possible before retreating to safety. Having vision around 
major objectives is key.
Look for picks in the mid-game. You deal lots of damage and can easily blow 
champions up. Try to kill someone and then abuse their death timer to earn 
more gold.
gamePlan.late:
Ward major objectives and place vision in high traffic areas in the late 
stages of the game. Keep them warded so you can see the enemy move around 
the map and see them starting the objective.
Stay with your team at all times. Avoid moving around the map alone so you 
do not get caught out. Getting caught out will result in your team having 
to play 4v5. Do not ward alone unless you know where the enemy is.
Peel for your allies as much as possible. Keeping them alive for as long as 
possible in team fights is a must in order to win the game.

powerSpikes.early:
Zyra’s early game poke is very good. Once you have a few levels behind you, 
you’ll be able to constantly harass the enemy with your Q and E. Gaining an early health lead could set up your Jungler or could allow you 
to get an early kill.
Once Zyra has upgraded her Boots, her mobility and damage output will 
increase. Zyra should get Boots and upgrade them as quickly as possible to 
increase her damage output.
At level 6, Zyra’s damage output and kill pressure further intensify. Play 
around your Ultimate R to look for aggressive plays with your ADC. Your Ultimate R will deal a considerable amount of damage, so you should be able to get 
kills with it easily.
powerSpikes.mid:
In the mid-game, teams will start grouping. Thanks to Zyra’s AOE abilities, 
she will be rather good during this stage in the game as she will be able 
to deal damage to multiple enemy champions at once.
Zyra would’ve also completed multiple items when the mid-game roles around. 
Because of this, your abilities will deal a lot more damage which will 
allow you to pick of squishy targets.
At level 9, Zyra would’ve maxed either her Q or her E. Regardless of which one you maxed first, you should be able to deal a lot 
of damage to the enemy laner during the mid-game or the later parts of the 
laning phase.
powerSpikes.late:
In the late game, your build should be coming to completion. While you will deal a considerable amount of damage, it will be harder for you to one-shot targets as the enemy team would’ve started to pick up defensive items.
At level 16, Zyra will put the final point in her Ultimate  R. The utility and damage this ability provides at this rank is very good, and she will be a menace in team fights.
Thanks to her low cooldowns and plants, Zyra will help her team quickly secure neutral objectives such as the Baron or Elder Dragon. Don’t be afraid to make the call for these objectives if your team’s in a position to do so.

guideVi.strengths: Zyra phù hợp với vai trò đi rừng, hỗ trợ, có nhịp đầu trận mạnh, giữa trận mạnh và cuối trận trung bình. Điểm mạnh chính là khả năng cấu rỉa, lối chơi kiểm soát bản đồ và bộ công cụ gồm Pet, Sight, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave. Khi giữ đúng vị trí, Zyra có thể tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt bằng Deadly Spines và Stranglethorns.
guideVi.weaknesses: Zyra sẽ gặp khó nếu bị ép đánh lệch khỏi điều kiện cấu rỉa hoặc dùng kỹ năng quan trọng sai thời điểm. Độ khó 2 yêu cầu người chơi quản lý khoảng cách, hồi chiêu và vị trí. Khi giai đoạn không thuận lợi trận yếu, cần tránh giao tranh thiếu thông tin và không để đối thủ kiểm soát nhịp mục tiêu.

gamePlan.early: Chủ động tạo lợi thế ở đi rừng, hỗ trợ. Trao đổi khi Deadly Spines sẵn sàng, đẩy nhịp trước đối thủ và chuyển quyền ưu tiên sang sông hoặc rừng.
gamePlan.mid: Di chuyển cùng đồng đội để phát huy khả năng cấu rỉa. Đến sớm quanh mục tiêu, kiểm soát góc tiếp cận và dùng Stranglethorns theo nhịp mở hoặc phản giao tranh.
gamePlan.late: Hạn chế kéo dài ván đấu bằng các pha đánh rời rạc. Ưu tiên bắt lẻ, kiểm soát tầm nhìn và phối hợp kỹ năng với đồng đội thay vì tự mở giao tranh không chắc chắn.

powerSpikes.early: Mốc sức mạnh sớm đến khi Zyra có đủ bộ kỹ năng cơ bản, đặc biệt là Deadly Spines. Với đánh giá đầu trận mạnh, hãy điều chỉnh mức chủ động theo kèo đường.
powerSpikes.mid: Giữa trận, Zyra mạnh hơn khi hoàn thành trang bị chủ chốt và nâng cấp kỹ năng chính. Stranglethorns là cooldown quan trọng để tranh mục tiêu và tạo lợi thế quân số.
powerSpikes.late: Cuối trận của Zyra được đánh giá trung bình. Giá trị lớn nhất đến từ vị trí, phối hợp Pet, Sight, Aoe, Burst Dame, Clearwave và sử dụng Stranglethorns đúng giao tranh quyết định.
